solution.p: yp=70 is not linear because it multiplies two variables together.
V^{2}+q^{2}=-59 and \pi r^{2}\neq41\pi are not linear because variables are raised to the second power.
\left|-8y-9\right|=1 is not linear because a variable is within absolute value bars.
That leaves 7z-1\lt-45 and z\sqrt{20}\geq-61\text{,} which are both linear.
